meaning: n.[生化]可诱导性(指酶分子在存有适当的去阻遏物的情况下可以诱导产生)
examples: The inducibility of Shah You-6 was higher than that of Tai Zhong Yu-39.
Two constitutive forms were different in molecular weight, inducibility and immunochemical properties.
The premature beats from lower right atrium and left atrial appendage showed higher inducibility of AF.
